mapper.select:
SELECT bc.id AS id, bc.company_name AS text, bc.company_name AS companyName, bc.company_type As companyType, bc.`status` AS `status`, bc.match_user_id AS matchUserId, bc.company_phone As companyPhone, bc.contact_phone As contactPhone, bc.contact_name As contactName, bc.address As address, bc.on_line_flg As onLineFlg, ac.bank_account As bankAccount, ac.bank_name As bankName, ac.tax_no As taxNo, IFNULL(bc.total_credit_amount,0) As totalCreditAmount, IFNULL(bc.used_credit_amount,0) As usedCreditAmount, IFNULL(bc.total_credit_amount-bc.used_credit_amount,0) As remainCreditAmount, IFNUll(bc.credit_days,0) As creditAmountDays, bc.rate As rate, bc.interest_rate As interestRate, bc.rate_type As rateType, bc.credit_cycle_type As creditCycleType, bc.credit_cycle As creditCycle, bc.vip_level As vipLevel, bc.supplier_rating As supplierRating, bc.credit_rating As creditRating, bc.supplier_prepay_amount as supplierPrepayAmount, bc.used_supplier_prepay_amount as usedSupplierPrepayAmount, bc.supplier_future as supplierFuture, bc.credit_delivery as creditDelivery, bc.supplier_delivery as supplierDelivery, bc.supplier_purchase_amount as supplierPurchaseAmount, bc.used_supplier_purchase_amount as usedSupplierPurchaseAmount, bc.company_grade as companyGrade, bc.supplier_grade as supplierGrade, bc.picc_credit_amount as piccCreditAmount, bc.da_di_credit_amount as daDiCreditAmount, bc.access_report_flg as accessReportFlg, bc.actual_guarantee_flg as actualGuaranteeFlg FROM t_bs_company bc LEFT JOIN t_bs_company_account ac ON bc.id = ac.company_id WHERE bc.enable_flg = true
AND bc.total_credit_amount > 0
AND IF(ISNULL(ac.default_flg),1 = 1,ac.default_flg = true) AND bc.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId}
AND ( bc.match_user_id = #{matchUserId} OR EXISTS ( SELECT bs.id FROM t_bs_company_share bs WHERE bc.id = bs.company_id AND bs.shared_user_id = #{matchUserId} AND bs.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} ) )
AND bc.company_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{companyName},'%')
UNION SELECT bc.id AS id, bc.company_name AS text, bc.company_name AS companyName, bc.company_type As companyType, bc.`status` AS `status`, bc.match_user_id AS matchUserId, bc.company_phone As companyPhone, bc.contact_phone As contactPhone, bc.contact_name As contactName, bc.address As address, bc.on_line_flg As onLineFlg, ac.bank_account As bankAccount, ac.bank_name As bankName, ac.tax_no As taxNo, IFNULL(bc.total_credit_amount,0) As totalCreditAmount, IFNULL(bc.used_credit_amount,0) As usedCreditAmount, IFNULL(bc.total_credit_amount-bc.used_credit_amount,0) As remainCreditAmount, IFNUll(bc.credit_days,0) As creditAmountDays, bc.rate As rate, bc.interest_rate As interestRate, bc.rate_type As rateType, bc.credit_cycle_type As creditCycleType, bc.credit_cycle As creditCycle, bc.vip_level As vipLevel, bc.supplier_rating As supplierRating, bc.credit_rating As creditRating, bc.supplier_prepay_amount as supplierPrepayAmount, bc.used_supplier_prepay_amount as usedSupplierPrepayAmount, bc.supplier_future as supplierFuture, bc.credit_delivery as creditDelivery, bc.supplier_delivery as supplierDelivery, bc.supplier_purchase_amount as supplierPurchaseAmount, bc.used_supplier_purchase_amount as usedSupplierPurchaseAmount, bc.company_grade as companyGrade, bc.supplier_grade as supplierGrade, bc.picc_credit_amount as piccCreditAmount, bc.da_di_credit_amount as daDiCreditAmount, bc.access_report_flg as accessReportFlg, bc.actual_guarantee_flg as actualGuaranteeFlg FROM t_bs_company bc LEFT JOIN t_bs_company_account ac ON bc.id = ac.company_id WHERE bc.enable_flg = true
AND bc.total_credit_amount > 0
AND IF(ISNULL(ac.default_flg),1 = 1,ac.default_flg = true) AND bc.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} AND bc.company_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{companyName},'%') AND (bc.match_user_id IS NULL OR bc.company_type = 'T') AND bc.id NOT IN ( SELECT c.id FROM t_bs_company c WHERE c.enable_flg = true
AND c.total_credit_amount > 0
AND c.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} AND ( c.match_user_id = #{matchUserId} OR EXISTS ( SELECT bs.id FROM t_bs_company_share bs WHERE c.id = bs.company_id AND bs.shared_user_id = #{matchUserId} AND bs.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} ) ) )

SELECT bc.id AS id, bc.company_name AS text, bc.company_name AS companyName, bc.company_type As companyType, bc.`status` AS `status`, bc.match_user_id AS matchUserId, bc.company_phone As companyPhone, bc.contact_phone As contactPhone, bc.contact_name As contactName, bc.address As address, bc.on_line_flg As onLineFlg, ac.bank_account As bankAccount, ac.bank_name As bankName, ac.tax_no As taxNo, IFNULL(bc.total_credit_amount,0) As totalCreditAmount, IFNULL(bc.used_credit_amount,0) As usedCreditAmount, IFNULL(bc.total_credit_amount-bc.used_credit_amount,0) As remainCreditAmount, IFNUll(bc.credit_days,0) As creditAmountDays, bc.rate As rate, bc.interest_rate As interestRate, bc.rate_type As rateType, bc.credit_cycle_type As creditCycleType, bc.credit_cycle As creditCycle, bc.vip_level As vipLevel, bc.supplier_rating As supplierRating, bc.credit_rating As creditRating, bc.supplier_prepay_amount as supplierPrepayAmount, bc.used_supplier_prepay_amount as usedSupplierPrepayAmount, bc.supplier_future as supplierFuture, bc.credit_delivery as creditDelivery, bc.supplier_delivery as supplierDelivery, bc.supplier_purchase_amount as supplierPurchaseAmount, bc.used_supplier_purchase_amount as usedSupplierPurchaseAmount, bc.company_grade as companyGrade, bc.supplier_grade as supplierGrade, bc.picc_credit_amount as piccCreditAmount, bc.da_di_credit_amount as daDiCreditAmount, bc.access_report_flg as accessReportFlg, bc.actual_guarantee_flg as actualGuaranteeFlg FROM t_bs_company bc LEFT JOIN t_bs_company_account ac ON bc.id = ac.company_id and ac.default_flg = true WHERE bc.id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_bs_company WHERE company_name LIKE #{companyName} and enable_flg = true

select distinct b.id from t_bs_company a left join t_pm_approve b on a.id = b.company_id where a.match_user_id = #{matchUserId} and a.enable_flg = true union select distinct b.id from t_ctr_contract a left join t_pm_approve b on a.id = b.contract_id where a.match_user_id = #{matchUserId} and a.contract_type = 'S' and a.status = 'D'

select distinct b.id from t_bs_company a left join t_pm_approve b on a.id = b.company_id
and a.match_user_id in
#{item}
and a.enable_flg = true union select distinct b.id from t_ctr_contract a left join t_pm_approve b on a.id = b.contract_id
and a.match_user_id in
#{item}
and a.contract_type = 'S' and a.status = 'D'

SELECT bc.id AS id, bc.company_name AS text, bc.company_name AS companyName, bc.company_type As companyType, bc.`status` AS `status`, bc.match_user_id AS matchUserId, bc.company_phone As companyPhone, bc.contact_phone As contactPhone, bc.contact_name As contactName, bc.address As address, bc.on_line_flg As onLineFlg, IFNULL(bc.total_credit_amount,0) As totalCreditAmount, IFNULL(bc.used_credit_amount,0) As usedCreditAmount, IFNULL(bc.total_credit_amount-bc.used_credit_amount,0) As remainCreditAmount, IFNUll(bc.credit_days,0) As creditAmountDays, bc.rate As rate, bc.interest_rate As interestRate, bc.rate_type As rateType, bc.credit_cycle_type As creditCycleType, bc.credit_cycle As creditCycle, bc.vip_level As vipLevel, bc.supplier_rating As supplierRating, bc.credit_rating As creditRating, bc.supplier_prepay_amount as supplierPrepayAmount, bc.used_supplier_prepay_amount as usedSupplierPrepayAmount, bc.supplier_future as supplierFuture, bc.credit_delivery as creditDelivery, bc.supplier_delivery as supplierDelivery, bc.supplier_purchase_amount as supplierPurchaseAmount, bc.used_supplier_purchase_amount as usedSupplierPurchaseAmount, bc.company_grade as companyGrade, bc.supplier_grade as supplierGrade, bc.access_report_flg as accessReportFlg, bc.actual_guarantee_flg as actualGuaranteeFlg FROM t_bs_company bc

SELECT company_id AS companyId, credit_type AS creditType, IFNULL(credit_amount,0) AS creditAmount, risk_amount AS riskAmount, IFNULL(temporary_amount,0) AS temporaryAmount, IFNULL(used_credit_amount,0) AS usedCreditAmount FROM t_bs_company_credit WHERE enable_flg = TRUE AND company_id IN
#{companyIdList[${index}],jdbcType=INTEGER}

SELECT a.credit_amount, b.company_name, b.legal_represent, b.register_capital, DATE_FORMAT( b.start_date, '%Y-%m-%d' ) AS start_date, b.address, b.file_id, DATE_FORMAT( c.contract_time, '%Y-%m-%d' ) AS contract_time FROM t_bs_company_credit a LEFT JOIN t_bs_company b ON b.id = a.company_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT company_id, max( contract_time ) AS 'contract_time' FROM t_ctr_contract WHERE contract_type = 'S' AND contract_status != 'C' GROUP BY company_id ) c ON c.company_id = a.company_id WHERE a.credit_type = 0 AND IFNULL( a.credit_amount, 0 )> 100000 AND b.credit_rating != 'B' AND b.enable_flg = 1 AND b.company_type = 'I' order by contract_time desc
SELECT company_id, used_credit_amount, IFNULL(risk_amount,0)+IFNULL(temporary_amount,0)-IFNULL(used_credit_amount,0) as 'availableCreditAmount' FROM t_bs_company_credit WHERE credit_type = 0

SELECT * FROM (SELECT m.id AS companyId, m.owner_of_account_id AS matchUserId, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(c.contents, '$.creditType')) AS creditType, MIN(t.updated_date) AS creditDate FROM t_pm_approve t LEFT JOIN t_pm_process p ON t.process_id = p.id LEFT JOIN t_pm_approve_contents c ON c.approve_id = t.id LEFT JOIN t_bs_company m ON m.id = JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(c.contents, '$.companyId')) WHERE p.process_code = 'APPLY_QUOTA' AND t.status = 'D' AND t.enable_flg = TRUE AND JSON_VALID(c.contents) = 1 AND JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(c.contents, '$.type')) = 'Q' GROUP BY m.id ORDER BY t.updated_date DESC) t WHERE DATE_FORMAT(t.creditDate, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(#{openTime}, '%Y-%m')
